name: ASP.NET Misconfiguration: Creating Debug Binary
description: An ASP.NET application is deployed with debug compilation enabled, causing detailed debugging information including stack traces, framework versions, and internal paths to be exposed to attackers in production.
detection_pattern: META[web_config] node contains compilation debug=true setting that enables verbose error output through EGRESS[error_response] nodes, exposing internal application details without a CONTROL node ensuring debug is disabled in production deployment
